base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_layout_jungle_composite — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 contra. Stage 1 Jungle (side-scroll) — full horizontal scroll layout with palm trees, crates, waterfalls, river-bridges. 3456px wide = ~13 NES screens. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage 1 Jungle (side-scroll) — full horizontal scroll layout with palm trees, crates, waterfalls, river-bridges. 3456px wide = ~13 NES screens
